positive: A stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune) silhouette, sitting gracefully among glowing bioluminescent flora and ethereal nebulae. The composition should be centrally focused and symmetrical, featuring thick, clean line art mixed with minimal watercolor wash elements. The fox should be the primary subject, rendered with sharp, elegant lines and mystical energy. Use a high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, glowing turquoise, and touches of soft gold. The background should incorporate stylized geometric patterns and crescent moons, creating a cohesive, seamless print design. Focus on strong silhouettes and negative space to ensure print readability on various fabric colors. Minimalist yet richly detailed, vector art aesthetic, high contrast, centered composition, concept art style.
